##NAMES=Zheshengite
##RRUFFID=R250136
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Pb_4_ZnZn_2_(AsO_4_)_2_(PO_4_)_2_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Sanguozhuang Village, Yunnan Province, China
##OWNER=Geological Museum of China
##SOURCE=Ningyue Sun
##DESCRIPTION=Light yellow prismatic single crystals with chisel-like termination, associated with hemimorphite and azurite. Type sample, described in Sun et al (2024)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R250136

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
